result.evidence_summary: No evidence of a 'Piancavallo Nordic Marathon' cross-country ski race exists in the search results. Piancavallo is confirmed as a real location in Italy that hosts mountain running events (Piancavallo.run), but there is no mention of any cross-country skiing marathon at this location. The search results show Piancavallo is associated with trail running and mountain running competitions, not Nordic skiing events.
